agent_capabilities.router: Classifies user intent and routes to planner or casual.
agent_capabilities.planner: Breaks down objectives into a JSON step array.
agent_capabilities.executor: Uses tools to complete each step.
agent_capabilities.retriever: Searches ChromaDB for relevant code context.
agent_capabilities.summarizer: Compacts oversized histories to save tokens.
agent_capabilities.git: Executes git operations on the repo.
